scripts.generate: openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/iam.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o src/generated/iam --additional-properties=supportsES6=true,typescriptThreePlus=true,withInterfaces=true && openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/merchant-onboarding.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o src/generated/merchant-onboarding --additional-properties=supportsES6=true,typescriptThreePlus=true,withInterfaces=true
